recommendations.title: Blue Lagoon: The Awakening
recommendations.overview: Two high school students become stranded on a tropical island and must rely on each other for survival. They learn more about themselves and each other while falling in love.

recommendations.title: Fallen
recommendations.overview: For high schooler Aaron Corbett, turning 18 means becoming not just a man but a nephilim, too -- half human, half angel, with supernatural abilities.

recommendations.title: Hard Rain
recommendations.overview: An armored car driver tries to elude a gang of thieves while a flood ravages the countryside.

recommendations.title: The Lost Future

recommendations.title: Sherlock: The Abominable Bride
recommendations.genres: Crime, Drama, Mystery, Thriller, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Sherlock Holmes and Dr. Watson find themselves in 1890s London in this holiday special.

recommendations.title: Killing Daddy
recommendations.overview: When Cassie's father finds himself vulnerable and bedridden, she believes she has the perfect revenge for her mother's death.

recommendations.title: An Inspector Calls
recommendations.genres: Drama, Crime, Thriller, Mystery, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Northern England, 1912. The dinner of a wealthy family is interrupted by Inspector Goole, who only announces that a young woman has committed suicide. Then, he simply asks everyone present, one by one, if they knew her.

recommendations.title: Shirley
recommendations.overview: A famous horror writer finds inspiration for her next book after she and her husband take in a young couple.
